case_title: ERNEST TACHIHARA VS. EDINBURGH CASTLE, INC.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $150.00) SERVED MAR-23-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT EDINBURGH CASTLE, INC.
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE BETSY JOHNSON. FILED BY TACHIHARA, ERNEST
DECLARATION OF ERNEST TACHIHARA RE: AMENDED CLAIM FILED BY PLAINTIFF TACHIHARA, ERNEST

AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,230.00 FILED BY TACHIHARA, ERNEST AS TO DEFENDANT EDINBURGH CASTLE, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-06-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-06-2013 BY JUDGE PRO TEM BETSY JOHNSON. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: BETSY JOHNSON. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-06-2013 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-26-2013 - CONTINUED FOR DEFECTIVE PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUN-06-2013 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF MUST RE-SERVE DEFENDANT.APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,080.00 FILED BY TACHIHARA, ERNEST AS TO DEFENDANT EDINBURGH CASTLE, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-26-2013 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-26-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-26-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TACHIHARA, ERNEST RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EDINBURGH CASTLE, INC. $975.00 PRINCIPAL, $185.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,160.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
